_comment: Update pointer for the 'Update Library' flow. A device fetches this file, compares latest.libraryVersion to its installed catalog, and (if newer) downloads latest.url (the catalog manifest), then fetches each board listed in manifest.boards in order, validates them, and loads them via loadLibrary(boards, { libraryVersion }).

latest.notes: Minor: adds the AstroPixelsPlus (Panels) board — the reeltwo AstroPixelsPlus : panel commands: fixed macros (open/close/flutter x group 00 all / 01-10 / 11 top-pie / 12 bottom-dome) and dynamic hex-bitmask sequences (:<code>$<hexGroup>[,onMs,offMs,onEase,offEase] for open/close/flutter/wave/dance/shake/etc.). Completes the 7 AstroPixelsPlus subsystem boards.
